objects.query: SELECT StockKeepingUnit FROM Product2 WHERE StockKeepingUnit LIKE 'DL-%' ORDER BY StockKeepingUnit ASC
SELECT Name, PricingTerm, PricingTermUnit, SellingModelType, Status FROM ProductSellingModel ORDER BY Name ASC, SellingModelType ASC
SELECT Description, IsActive, IsStandard, Name FROM Pricebook2 WHERE IsStandard = true ORDER BY Name ASC

SELECT CurrencyIsoCode, IsActive, IsDerived, Name, Pricebook2Id, Product2Id, ProductSellingModelId, UnitPrice FROM PricebookEntry WHERE Product2.StockKeepingUnit LIKE 'DL-%' ORDER BY Product2.StockKeepingUnit ASC, ProductSellingModel.Name ASC, CurrencyIsoCode DESC
